title: notophaena tomentosa
intro: Notophaena tomentosa is a shrub-like plant native to Mexico, belonging to the family Asteraceae, which is also known as the daisy or sunflower family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Notophaena tomentosa has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory congestion, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Notophaena tomentosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make teas, syrups, and other medicinal products.
